display_text: Barricade. Tier 0 (Consumable): Creates a destructible barrier wall at target location. Wall lasts 8 seconds, blocks movement and vision, and has 300 bonus health plus 5 armor, taking up to 5 hits from heroes before destruction. Provides map control for area denial, vision blocking, or defensive choke points. Stats: CD: 45s, Duration: 8s, Wall Health: 300 (+5 armor), Hits to Destroy: 5.
